name: forge-harness
description: Forge agentic flywheel — metrics, GC scanning, changelog management via exec API

scripts.build: ncc build src/cli.ts -o scripts --minify --no-source-map-register && node -e "let f=require('fs'),p='scripts/index.js',c=f.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!/'))f.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)"
